      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  InferenceParameters
      Options to pass when calling methods using the API V2.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      JobResponse MindeeClientV2.enqueue​(LocalInputSource inputSource, BaseParameters params)
      Enqueue a document in the asynchronous queue.
      JobResponse MindeeClientV2.enqueue​(URLInputSource inputSource, BaseParameters params)
      Enqueue a document in the asynchronous queue.
      <TResponse extends CommonResponse>
      TResponse      		 MindeeClientV2.enqueueAndGetResult​(Class<TResponse> responseClass, LocalInputSource inputSource, BaseParameters params)
      Send a local file to an async queue, poll, and parse when complete.
      <TResponse extends CommonResponse>
      TResponse      		 MindeeClientV2.enqueueAndGetResult​(Class<TResponse> responseClass, URLInputSource inputSource, BaseParameters params)
      Send a remote file to an async queue, poll, and parse when complete.

      Send a file to the prediction queue with a local file.
